title: Product Manager
requirements_met: Own product for AI agents across customer touchpoints: matches Ryan building AI agents
Operate in small high-leverage distributed team: startup generalist + builder
Translate AI capabilities into product: AI builder + founder-facing background
gaps: Dedicated PM craft (roadmapping, discovery rituals) not Ryan's primary title history - adjacent generalist
Full requirements list not extractable (Ashby JS-rendered) - scored on role/company signal
preferred_met: Comfort with ambiguity in small startup

experience_fit.calculation: Mid-level builder/generalist fits PM-at-startup; dedicated PM track record is partial gap

industry_match.calculation: AI agents operating system for CX - exact AI-native alignment

location_match.calculation: Distributed/remote team; location not explicitly UK-confirmed but listing surfaced for London

salary_penalty.reason: Salary not listed; venture-backed AI startup PM role typically above GBP 50k floor

notes: Siena AI: operating system of AI agents for customer experience (support, shopping, voice, social). Small distributed high-leverage team. Ashby page JS-rendered; active status confirmed via Ashby listing existence. Requirements partially inferred from company/role signal.

must_haves.req: 3+ yrs in PM / solutions engineering / implementation / TAM / CS engineering / sales engineering / solutions consulting / product ops
must_haves.note: Listing welcomes 'the operator who wants to build', but its named paths are all technical-implementation/PM roles Ryan hasn't held by title. His operator/builder profile fits the spirit but not the literal list.

must_haves.req: AI-native mindset — live in Claude, Cursor, v0, max out daily LLM limits
must_haves.note: Direct hit — Ryan self-directedly builds AI agents with Claude Code daily since Aug 2023. His single strongest match across all 5 roles.

must_haves.req: Technical fluency — scope webhook systems, OAuth flows, complex integrations
must_haves.note: Operator-level technical literacy via agent building, but no evidence of scoping production webhook/OAuth integrations.

must_haves.req: Builder mentality — ship features, write docs, run demos, measure what matters
must_haves.note: Strong builder/GTM/content track record; demonstrably ships.

must_haves.req: Customer confidence — demos, co-selling alongside sales
Hands-on case study: vibe-code a small AI feature with live link + Loom
must_haves.note: Plays directly to Ryan's Claude Code agent-building — he can clear the gating case study.

hard_blockers: No prior SE/implementation/TAM/CS-engineering background — the role's literal experience paths; he applies as 'operator who wants to build', an accepted but riskier lane.

Geography: the Ashby record surfaced as London but the role's primary location is New York and the related Forward-Deployed PM is US/Canada — UK-only work authorization may be a constraint; verify London eligibility before applying.
met_strengths: Best AI-native fit of all five roles — daily Claude Code agent building is exactly what Siena prizes
Vibe-code case study + trial week reward demonstrable building over credentials, favouring Ryan
Builder + customer-facing + ships-fast profile aligns with stated values
interview_match.one_line_verdict: The most culture-aligned of the five for an AI-native builder and the hands-on case study favours Ryan, but the named 3+ yrs SE/PM/implementation paths and likely-US geography keep it a genuine stretch — verify London authorization.
